englishDefinitions: A phrase meaning the truck carrying camera equipment became unable to move, usually because of mud, traffic, or rough ground.
persianTranslation: ماشینِ حمل تجهیزات دوربین در گل/مانع ماند
examples: The camera truck got stuck in the mud before the shoot began.
When the camera truck got stuck, the crew had to wait.
The road was so narrow that the camera truck got stuck.
